summary: Messaging application with user-to-user conversations. Adding keyboard/send button functionality and updating uploaded-by display to show the artist's profile name instead of a generic label.

existing_features.title: In the ContentCard component (and any other location that displays an 'Uploaded by' label), replace the generic identifier with the actual artist/user display name fetched from their profile. Look up the uploader's profile using their principal and render their display name (e.g., 'Uploaded by <ArtistName>') instead of a raw principal or placeholder text.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add keyboard and send tab/button to message input
In the ConversationView component, update the message input area so that pressing the Enter key (without Shift) submits and sends the message, while Shift+Enter inserts a newline.

In the ConversationView component, ensure a visible 'Send' button is displayed alongside the message input. The button must be clearly styled and clickable to submit the message, consistent with the Arena neon dark theme.
Change the 'Uploaded by' label to display the artist's profile name instead of a generic identifier.
